ddt:Target.Name: APB_X91_L43_L47_V33
ddt:Target.Description:
Frein de parking automatique
Maj 02 juin 2006: personnalisation base FPA X91 avec spec diag on CAN version B Sce 65630 [G. HEDOUIN 54770] gael.hedouin@renault.com
Modification par C.CANDAS le 6 juin 2006 - Standardisation requête 2180
Mise à jour 21 février 2007: - Suppression data inutilisées - Prise en compte remarque CdC diag - Traduction anlglais pour RSM - Ok pour L43 et L47
Mise à jour le 22 Avril 2009: Sce 65630 [G. ROZE 54770] gael.roze@renault.com
- added Stop and Start specificities according to "APB X91 S&S DiagOnCan SpecB Version 3_1"

Data.Name: Brake force min level after locking timeout
Medium brake force of 255 last brakings
Motor braking release drain stable time
Motor current controller I component max

Item.Text: Memorised and not completed since last clear
Present and not completed since last clear

Data.Name: BkfMinOffset and slope
Data.Comment: brake force min ofsset and slope for max brake force

Data.Name: UPC Absent
Data.Comment: Pour X84 on attend $xx, Pour M2S on attend $FF

Item.Text: Repositionning tried and failed in Renault1
Repositionning tried and succeed in Renault 1

FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: ECU : System internal failure : Time Slice
Brake force sensor : Internal electronic failure
Power stage control : Internal electronic failure
Diode Palette : circuit short to battery
Diode Palette : circuit short to ground or open
Clutch : short to ground or open
Clutch : circuit voltage out of range
Clutch : wrong mountig position (always at maximum limit)
Event Information : max braking and vehicle speed detection
Mechanical linkage failure : max braking and odometer detection
Pallet : circuit short to battery or open
Pallet : circuit voltage out of range
Circuit voltage out of range (<7V) during brake or release command
Abnormal vehicle wake up by battery voltage > threshold

Data.Name: Stop and Start Configuration
Data.Description:
0: normal

1: stop and start

FF: not configured

Data.Name: DataRead - RDBI - Snapshot data.FF_Internal failure type

Item.Text: tilt sensor : over limits at zero speed
Init Static Braking at low speed

Test.Description: Ce défaut inhibe les fonctions automatiques du FPA - FPA manuel

Circuit voltage out of range (<7V) during brake or release command
Abnormal vehicle wake up by battery voltage > threshold
APB is tightened in static and detects movement by vehicle speed information (front wheels are moving)
APB is tightened in static and detects vehicle movement by odometer information (rear wheels are moving)

Display.DataName: Brake force min level after locking timeout

Label.Text: 5 - Check that cables are correctly mounted
4 - Send manually the MAP calibration data
6 - Check that Renault 2 factory mode is active
7 - Check that the vehicle is on flat ground Write the value of vehicle forward slope in Offset Axe X

Send.RequestName: WDBLI - Offset zero axe X correction
WDBLI - APB basic system mode Renault1
